Package com.wip.repository

Interface ShipmentRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Shipment,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Shipment,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Shipment,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Shipment,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Shipment,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Shipment>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Shipment,Long>
public interface ShipmentRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Shipment,Long>
Spring Data JPA repository for Shipment entity persistence operations.

Extends JpaRepository to inherit standard CRUD and pagination operations on the shipment table. Exposes custom derived finder methods to support tracking-number-based lookups, parcel-to-shipment resolution, and role-based data scoping that restricts non-admin users to shipments belonging to their own customers.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Shipment>
    findByCreatedBy_Username(String username)
    Retrieves all Shipment records created by the user with the specified username.
    List<Shipment>
    findByParcel_Customer_CreatedBy_Username(String username)
    Retrieves all Shipment records for parcels belonging to customers created by the specified user.

    Retrieves the Shipment associated with a specific parcel ID.
    Optional<Shipment>

    Retrieves a Shipment by its ID that was also created by the specified user.

    Retrieves a Shipment by its unique tracking number.

  • Method Details

    • findByTrackingNumber

      Optional<Shipment> findByTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
      Retrieves a Shipment by its unique tracking number.

      Used for public shipment tracking lookups where only the tracking number is known to the customer.

      Parameters:
      trackingNumber - the unique tracking number of the shipment
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the matching shipment, or empty if not found

    • findByParcel_ParcelId

      Optional<Shipment> findByParcel_ParcelId(Long parcelId)
      Retrieves the Shipment associated with a specific parcel ID.

      Since each parcel can have at most one shipment, this returns an Optional which is empty if no shipment has been created for the parcel yet.

      Parameters:
      parcelId - the ID of the parcel whose shipment is to be retrieved
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the associated shipment, or empty if none exists

    • findByCreatedBy_Username

      List<Shipment> findByCreatedBy_Username(String username)
      Retrieves all Shipment records created by the user with the specified username.

      Used to scope shipment visibility for admin users who may have created specific shipments.

      Parameters:
      username - the username of the creating AppUser
      Returns:
      a list of shipments created by the given user; empty if none found

    • findByShipmentIdAndCreatedBy_Username

      Optional<Shipment> findByShipmentIdAndCreatedBy_Username(Long shipmentId, String username)
      Retrieves a Shipment by its ID that was also created by the specified user.

      Used to verify ownership when an admin user attempts to access a shipment by ID.

      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the ID of the shipment to retrieve
      username - the username of the user who created the shipment
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the matching shipment, or empty if not found or not owned by the given user

    • findByParcel_Customer_CreatedBy_Username

      List<Shipment> findByParcel_Customer_CreatedBy_Username(String username)
      Retrieves all Shipment records for parcels belonging to customers created by the specified user.

      Traverses the relationship chain Shipment -> Parcel -> Customer -> CreatedBy to return all shipments that are accessible to a regular (non-admin) user based on their customer ownership.

      Parameters:
      username - the username of the user who created the parent customers
      Returns:
      a list of shipments associated with the given user's customers; empty if none found
